title: psacalium palmeri
intro: Psacalium palmeri, also known as Palmer's yerba, is a perennial shrub native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Psacalium palmeri include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Psacalium palmeri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
